case_title: LEE, HENRY vs. WINGFIELD, ROBER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT WINGFIELD, ROBER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WINGFIELD, ROBER ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WINGFIELD, ROBER
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-19-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-20-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PLTF COUNSEL J.BORNSTEIN CONTACTED CLERK TO INFORM COURT THAT HE COULD NOT APPEAR FOR TRIAL UNTIL 11AM DUE TO APP IN ANOTHER COUNTY. CASE SET OVER 1 DAY BY COURT; DEFT ORDERED TO APPEAR ON 5-20-97 AT 9AM IN DEPT 1. PLTF COUNSEL NOTIFIED BY CLERK.

#1 JUDGE:D.LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF'S DAUGHTER PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. JUDGMENT PURS. TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINGFIELD, ROBER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1267 11TH AVE, APT #4, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT SHALL NOT VACATE PREMISES. DEFT TO PAY AS FOLLOWS ON OR BEFORE 5PM - $1,842.50 6/6/97, $1,842.50 6/13/97.FROM 7/1/97 THRU 7/1/98 DEFT TO PAY RENT ON OR BEFORE 1ST OF THE MONTH. DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY PLTF ENTITLED TO IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
